'''Debbikin''' '''''the Elder''''' was a member of the [[Cestus Cybernetics]] Family led by his son, [[Debbikin the Young]].

==Biography==
The [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Families of Cestus Cybernetics]] aspired to overthrow the Regent [[G'Mai Duris]] from the government. The [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the [[Vippit]] [[Doolb Snoil]] managed to make the Regent give up trusting the Families. Finally, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] cruiser [[Nexu (starship)|''Nexu'']] bombed the bunker where his son was hidden, resulting in Debbikin's death. The remaining members of the Families had formed an agreement with the Regent and the Republic.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
